_comment: Copy this file to workloads.<env>.json, fill in values, and run ./scripts/New-WorkloadApps.ps1 -ConfigPath <path>. workloads.*.json (except this .example) is gitignored.

federatedCredentials._comment: Example UAMI federation — only fill in once the UAMI exists. For Azure-native workloads the UAMI can call IMDS directly without this; use federation only for Arc / GitHub Actions / Kubernetes workload-identity scenarios.
federatedCredentials.name: mergerarb-madam-uami-dev
federatedCredentials.subject: REPLACE_WITH_UAMI_OBJECT_ID
federatedCredentials.description: UAMI used by the MADAM workload in dev.
